'''鈭歬-m-zh-v''' ('''kakamzhevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:orthorectify|orthorectify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:orthorectify|orthorectify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-m-zh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kakamzhevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikamzhevoko|thikamzhevoko]] || [[word:jikamzhevoko|jikamzhevoko]] || [[word:shikamzhevoko|shikamzhevoko]] || [[word:kikamzhevoko|kikamzhevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
